nasb.text: However, there will be no poor among you, since the Lord will surely bless you in the land which the Lord your God is giving you as an inheritance to possess,

esv.text: But there will be no poor among you; for the Lord will bless you in the land that the Lord your God is giving you for an inheritance to possess—

cnv.text: 在你中間必沒有窮人，因為在耶和華你的　神賜給你作產業的地上，耶和華必大大賜福給你。
